sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106307" key="u(datopwte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδᾰτο-πωτέω</orth>, <sense id="n106307.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink water,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:288" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">288</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑδροπωτέω.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
